---
title: "Hint of proper funding for cycling, but we must fight for it – with evidence"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2014). Hint of proper funding for cycling, but we must fight for it – with evidence."
date: "2014-10-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_hint_2014"
citation-type: ""
citation-type-label: ""
venue: ""
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://theconversation.com/hint-of-proper-funding-for-cycling-but-we-must-fight-for-it-with-evidence-33152 https://theconversation.com/hint-of-proper-funding-for-cycling-but-we-must-fight-for-it-with-evidence-33152"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "The parliamentary debate on cycling was a wake-up call to the government on cycling. The coalition government has been floundering, with a botched timeline for release of their Walking and Cycling Delivery\\ldots"
---

**Type:** 
**Year:** 2014

[URL](http://theconversation.com/hint-of-proper-funding-for-cycling-but-we-must-fight-for-it-with-evidence-33152 https://theconversation.com/hint-of-proper-funding-for-cycling-but-we-must-fight-for-it-with-evidence-33152) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

The parliamentary debate on cycling was a wake-up call to the government on cycling. The coalition government has been floundering, with a botched timeline for release of their Walking and Cycling Delivery\ldots

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2014). Hint of proper funding for cycling, but we must fight for it – with evidence.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{lovelace_hint_2014,
	title = {Hint of proper funding for cycling, but we must fight for it – with evidence},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://theconversation.com/hint-of-proper-funding-for-cycling-but-we-must-fight-for-it-with-evidence-33152 https://theconversation.com/hint-of-proper-funding-for-cycling-but-we-must-fight-for-it-with-evidence-33152},
	abstract = {The parliamentary debate on cycling was a wake-up call to the government on cycling. The coalition government has been floundering, with a botched timeline for release of their Walking and Cycling Delivery{\textbackslash}ldots},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = oct,
	year = {2014},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
